articles.title: Why Cardano's Midnight Airdrop Stands Out Amid a Catalog of Flops
articles.description: Cardano's Midnight project introduces the Glacier drop, an unprecedented token distribution model that sets a fairer standard.

articles.title: Solana DeFi Surges as Six Protocols Break the $1 Billion TVL Barrier
articles.description: Solana’s DeFi ecosystem rebounds as six protocols exceed $1 billion in TVL each, led by Jito’s liquid staking dominance and Kamino’s meteoric growth in lending markets.

articles.title: EigenLayer token trades on exchanges at $7 billion FDV as transfer restrictions lift
articles.description: EigenLayer lifted transfer restrictions on its EIGEN token, enabling trading on various centralized exchanges.
